file_insights.purpose: Establish empty directory structure in git
file_insights.significance: Enables version control of the .github/workflows directory without requiring actual workflow files initially

patterns_discovered: Using .gitkeep placeholder files as a common git pattern to track empty directories
Minimal, single-file approach to establishing directory hierarchy
Direct implementation without intermediate steps or dependencies

approach_outcome.scope: Minimal - only directory structure placeholder created

recommendations: Future tasks should add actual GitHub Actions workflow files (.yml) to this directory rather than relying solely on .gitkeep
Consider adding a .github/workflows/README.md to document the purpose and structure of workflows in this repository
Validate that this directory structure aligns with the overall CI/CD strategy planned for the project
Monitor whether .gitkeep should be replaced with actual workflow files in subsequent implementation tasks
